arts.ttl: Report: What Mathys Tel directly informed Bayern Munich about Tottenham after listening to Spurs' project
Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Holstein Kiel.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Mathys Tel still weighing options; Bayern Munich could nab Xavi Simons this summer; Tottenham Hotspur picking up pieces after Tel rejection; FC Barcelona making moves?; Juventus star shoots down Saudi future; and MORE!
arts.sum: Mathys Tel weighing options, likely to miss Holstein Kiel match (Fabrizio Romano) Xavi Simons might have made the permanent move from Paris Saint-Germain to RB Leipzig, but that transaction will not prevent the attacker from turning around and making the jump to Bayern Munich during the summer.

arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston braced for Celtic Roadrunner challenge as Bayern Munich draw pits him against old pal
arts.sum: Hoops full-back can't wait to go up against Alphonso Davies and Munich's array of superstars

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany, Max Eberl tackle Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is not going to underestimate Holstein Kiel — especially after what the 17th-place side did to Borussia Dortmund two weeks ago. A look at the rosters and injuries for Holstein Kiel and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Stuttgart balking at Alexander Nübel’s salary, despite Bayern Munich’s partial coverage
arts.sum: Stuttgart would like to keep Alexander Nübel permanently, but his salary is too high for the club. Stuttgart’s sporting director Fabian Wohlgemuth concedes that at the current rate that the 28-year-old earns, it is beyond the reach of their club.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: First signing travels for medical as Mathys Tel talks continue
arts.sum: Manchester United have a great deal of transfer work to do before the window shuts on Monday night with Mathys Tel, Patrick Dorgu and Marcus Rashford dominating the headlines

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boasts €765M revenue in 2024, per report
arts.sum: Deloitte’s Football Money League has the Bavarians fifth in club revenue last year, behind Manchester United. Bayern Munich remains one of world football’s premier brands, per the latest Deloitte’s Football Money League report.

arts.ttl: Future Bayern Munich player Tom Bischof lights up the Europa League in MOTM display
arts.sum: There has been plenty of recent consternation over Bayern Munich ’s treatment of young players and the club’s struggle to guide them through their development, with this worry extending to Tom Bischof, the teenager who will arrive in the summer on a free transfer from TSG Hoffenheim. Is he going to be given a chance or just binned off because the older guys in the team soak up all the playing time?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s board has approved Alphonso Davies’ €120 million extension package
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is trying to balance their books by reducing wages or selling players outright. With Alphonso Davies, Joshua Kimmich, and Jamal Musiala all set to receive bumps in pay, here’s what the club’s situation looks like now:
